s2.title: Guardian Cell
s2.l1: An alert has been triggered and I need your help to fix it!

s3.title: Guardian Cell
s3.l1: We found two suspicious cells that could be the cause of the unusual cell replication.

s4.title: Guardian Cell
s4.l1: Let's see what they have to say.

s5.title: Cell A
s5.l1: It couldn't have been me. I was at the event!

s6.title: Cell B
s6.l1: He is lying! I was at the event!

s7.title: Guardian Cell
s7.l2: I can't tell who is telling the truth...

s8.title: Guardian Cell
s8.l2: Your mission is to attend the event.

s9.title: Guardian Cell
s9.l1: Look for any clues and report what you notice.

quest.noneAvailable: No quests available at the moment.

feedback.submitDescription: Find out who the culprit is!

thankYou.line2: Guardian Cell will analyze the cellular disruption.
thankYou.line3: Report uploaded to the tissue database.
thankYou.line4: Await further instructions from the lab core.

instruction.title: Let's start the interrogation!
instruction.bold: Click on either Cell A or Cell B
instruction.rest: depending on which option fits your experience the most.
instruction.boldNeutral: Click on either Option 1 or Option 2
instruction.restNeutral: depending on which option fits your experience the most.

errors.answerAll: Please answer all questions before submitting.
errors.submitFailed: Could not submit feedback. Please try again.

scan.pinCorrect: PIN correct! You can now proceed.
scan.pinIncorrectTryAgain: PIN is incorrect, please try again.
scan.httpsHint: Camera access needs HTTPS. Use localtunnel or ngrok.
scan.httpsRequired: Camera access requires HTTPS. Please use ngrok or localtunnel.
scan.noCameraSupport: Your browser doesn't support camera access.
scan.cameraInUse: Camera is in use by another app.

rewards.title: Collect Your Rewards
rewards.description: Done with your quests? Redeem your reward here.
rewards.confirmMessage: By continuing, it will be assumed that you have redeemed your reward. This action cannot be undone.

feedbackScene.thankYouTitle: Thank you for saving the day! As a token of gratitude, a reward is granted to you.

cell_a.title: It seems like Cell A is the Culprit!

cell_b.title: It seems like Cell B is the Culprit!
